title: Cauliflower Black Bean Tostadas with Queso and Pickled Onion
description: Tangy, creamy, crunchy, smoky, seasoned vegetarian goodness on a perfectly crisp little corn tortilla disk. Cauliflower Black Bean Tostadas to the rescue!
ingredients: 1 large head of cauliflower, cut into florets
1 package taco seasoning (I like Siete brand)
one 14-ounce can refried black beans (I like Amy’s brand)
8-10 small corn tortillas (I like Mission street tacos tortillas)
1/4 cup of vegetable or canola oil
queso (I like Queso Mama brand – the green chile variety)

title: Socca with Whipped Feta and Tomato Salad
description: Socca with Whipped Feta and Tomato Salad! HELLO. Crispy, creamy, tangy, and summery all on one plate.
ingredients: 2 tablespoons olive oil (and extra for the pan)
2-3 cups cherry or grape tomatoes, halved
1 cup cucumber slices (optional, but adds a nice crunch)
1-2 tablespoons white vinegar or lemon juice
1 small clove garlic, grated or finely minced
a pinch of salt and freshly ground black pepper
fresh chopped herbs (optional – I like parsley)
2 ounces cream cheese, whole milk yogurt, mascarpone… something thick and creamy
thyme, basil, rosemary, or any other herbs you like (I like thyme!)

title: Liz's Bistro Salad
description: Crunchy, light, bright, and ultra-fresh. This French-inspired bistro salad is an absolute star as a side for nearly any dinner. Tender greens, fresh herbs, pickled onions, and a delicate vinaigrette on top.
ingredients: 1/4 cup white or red wine vinegar
a pinch of salt and sugar
1 romaine heart, stem removed and chopped
half a head of butter lettuce, stem removed, gently torn
1/2 cup fresh dill, chopped or torn
1 teaspoon dijon mustard or mayo – the purpose of this is to emulsify the dressing

title: Loaded Caprese Grilled Cheese
description: This Caprese Grilled Cheese is loaded with basil pesto, a thick and chunky garlic butter tomato sauce, and fresh mozzarella cheese, all on grilled sourdough bread. The perfect taste of summer.
ingredients: 4 large slices of thick, yummy sourdough bread
4 thick slices of fresh mozzarella cheese
2 tablespoons butter – I used Land O Lakes® Salted Butter in Half Sticks
2 tablespoons butter – I used Land O Lakes® Salted Butter in Half Sticks

title: Roasted Veggie Grain Bowl with Balsamic Dressing
description: The BEST Grain Bowl! Roasted root vegetables, earthy grains, dried fruit, dark leafy greens, buttery goat cheese, and lusciously creamy balsamic dressing.
ingredients: 3 large golden or red beets, cubed
olive oil and salt for roasting

title: Detox Rainbow Roll-Ups with Peanut Sauce
description: Detox Rainbow Roll-Ups - with curry hummus and veggies in a collard leaf, dunked in peanut sauce! Most beautiful healthy desk lunch!
ingredients: 1/4 cup soy sauce (tamari or coconut aminos if gluten free)

title: BBQ Jackfruit Sandwiches
description: These BBQ Jackfruit Sandwiches feature a "meaty" mix of jackfruit and chickpeas tossed in spices, garlic, and a bit of BBQ sauce. Pile it all on top of a toasted bun with slaw and dinner is ready!
ingredients: 14-ounce can young jackfruit in brine, drained and rinsed
1/2 cup canned chickpeas, drained and rinsed
several good shakes of paprika, chili powder, and onion powder
ideally, a pre-made slaw bag mix!
otherwise: thinly sliced cabbage + mayo, lemon juice or vinegar, sugar and salt
any other toppings you like – I’d recommend avocado, pepperoncini, pickles, hot sauce, etc.

title: Basic + Awesome Broccoli Cheese Soup
description: This Broccoli Cheese Soup is easy, creamy, and a perfect cozy classic. A silky-smooth soup base, little bites of just-right broccoli and carrots, and some sharp creamy cheddar cheese to finish it off.
ingredients: 2-3 cups broccoli florets, chopped into very small pieces
1 teaspoon salt (more or less to taste)
an 8-ounce block of good quality extra-sharp cheddar cheese, grated

title: Portobello French Dip with Horseradish Aioli
description: These Portobello French Dips are about to change your life! Roasty portobello strips, golden caramelized onions, melted Provolone cheese, zippy horseradish aioli, all piled on a warm, crusty roll.
ingredients: 4 portobello mushroom caps, sliced into thin strips
1-2 teaspoons Montreal steak seasoning (or just a sprinkle of salt and pepper)
salt, pepper, and a pinch of sugar to taste
4 crusty sourdough rolls, or a baguette cut into 4 sections

title: Teriyaki Tofu Bowls with Kimchi Mayo
description: Bowls packed with teriyaki tofu that gets shredded and caramelized in a sweet and garlicky sauce! A fast and easy weeknight dinner that's high in texture and flavor!

title: Butter Cauliflower and Chickpeas with Mint Cilantro Sauce
description: This Butter Cauliflower and Chickpeas is a weeknight staple! Roasty spiced cauliflower, a jar of butter sauce, a can of chickpeas, and a pile of steamy rice with a waterfall of mint sauce on top.
ingredients: 1 head cauliflower, cut into florets (about 3 cups)
1 teaspoon each cumin, garam masala, and curry powder
1 jar of butter chicken sauce (24.5 ounces) or homemade
1/2 cup mayo or plain Greek yogurt

title: Cauliflower Orange Gnocchi
description: An at-home version of the Bar La Grassa favorite: Cauliflower Orange Gnocchi! Pillowy gnocchi, glossy sauce, paper-thin cauliflower. IT'S SO GOOD.
ingredients: a medium-large head of cauliflower, cored and thinly sliced into bite-sized pieces on a mandoline (about 3 cups)
juice and zest of 1 orange (about 2 tablespoons of juice, zest to taste)

title: One-Pan Farro with Tomatoes and Kale
description: This One-Pan Farro with Tomatoes and Kale is a straight-up DREAM! Rustic farro cozied up to cherry tomatoes, onions, garlic, and kale. So good and so wholesome!
ingredients: 10 ounces grape or cherry tomatoes, halved
a few stalks of kale, stems removed, chopped into small pieces (about 2 cups)
1/4 cup olive oil (optional, but makes it a bit more luscious)
chicken, meatballs, or a fried egg

title: Vegetarian Shepherd's Pie
description: Vegetarian Shepherd's Pie ♡ saucy mushrooms, carrots, and peas topped with creamy mashed potatoes. Real food meets comfort food!
ingredients: 3 shallots, minced (or some onions and garlic)
1 teaspoon salt (more or less to taste)

title: Sesame Apricot Tofu
description: Torn-up tofu pan-fried into crispiness and made saucy, sticky, and sweet into this Sesame Apricot Tofu. An easy, simple vegetarian dinner that's deliciously saving my life!
ingredients: 1 block of extra firm tofu (high protein tofu works really well in this recipe, if you can find it!)
1/2 teaspoon each cumin, paprika, and onion powder
1-2 cloves garlic, grated (2 for more garlic flavor, obviously)
1-2 tablespoons toasted sesame oil to taste
1/4 cup chives and/or cilantro for topping

title: Quinoa Crunch Salad with Peanut Dressing
description: Quinoa Crunch Salad! Crunchy rainbow veggies, juicy fresh mango, fluffy quinoa, chili lime cashews, and some creamy peanut dressing.
ingredients: half a head of purple cabbage, shredded
sliced almonds, peanuts, cashews, etc. (I used the addicting Southern Grove Chili Lime Cashews from ALDI)
1/2 cup Simply Nature Creamy Peanut Butter
1/3 cup vinegar (white distilled or rice vinegar)
1-2 tablespoons chili paste like sambal oelek

title: Zaalouk Toasts with Burrata
description: Zaalouk toast for all! Golden crisp sourdough toasts topped with a smoky eggplant and tomato mixture, plus creamy burrata and olive oil drizzles over it all.
ingredients: one 14-ounce can crushed tomatoes (I used crushed San Marzano tomatoes)
sourdough or Tuscan style sliced bread
a generous amount of olive oil
olive oil, salt, pepper, and more herbs for topping

title: Roasted Cauliflower Lettuce Wraps with Korean BBQ-Inspired Sauce
description: Roasted Cauliflower Lettuce Wraps with Korean BBQ-Inspired Sauce! Crispy roasted cauliflower tossed in a sweet and sticky Korean BBQ sauce, all topped with chives, peanuts, and spicy mayo. YUM.
ingredients: 6-8 cups small cauliflower florets (1 large or 2 small heads)
spicy mayo (1/4 cup mayo with a 1 teaspoon of sriracha)
1 tablespoon sambal oelek (or a spicy chile paste, or sriracha – use less for a milder sauce)

title: Creamy Kale Pasta
description: This Creamy Kale Pasta is fresh, easy, and DELICIOUS. Chewy bowtie pasta, coated in a light, salty, barely-creamy sauce, flecked with red pepper flakes and little bits of tender sautéed garlic kale.
ingredients: juice and zest of half a lemon
2 stalks kale, stems removed, leaves chopped into bite-sized pieces
1/2 cup white wine, reserved cooking water, broth, or any combination
lemon juice, red pepper flakes, and Parmesan to finish (omit Parmesan if vegan)

title: Chipotle Quinoa Burgers
description: Chipotle Quinoa Burgers - veggie burgers you'll want to make again and again! Filling but not too dense, crispy but not crumbly, and with all the smokiness and yumminess with none of the meat.
ingredients: one 14-ounce can black beans, rinsed and drained
1-2 individual chipotle peppers (not the whole can)
1/2 teaspoon each: garlic powder, onion powder, chili powder, cumin

title: Vegetarian Chili
description: Vegetarian Chili that's "meaty" and satisfying - without the meat! A hearty mixture of walnuts, mushrooms, and carrots as your base, with big flavors of onion, garlic, green chiles and spices. SO GOOD.
ingredients: 8 ounces fresh mushrooms, washed, stems removed
1 6-ounce can diced green chiles (or fresh minced jalapeños)
1-2 teaspoons salt (more or less to taste)
2 14-ounce cans diced or crushed tomatoes (with juices)
1 14-ounce can beans of choice (optional, see notes)

title: Cozy Veggie Korma
description: Cozy Veggie Korma! A boatload of comforting vegetables like potatoes, bell peppers, and green beans, and a creamy golden sauce with onion, garlic, ginger, warming spices. So comforting!
ingredients: 2 gold potatoes, peeled and cubed (about 3 cups)
2 cups green beans, cut into 1-inch pieces
1-2 red bell pepper, cut into 1-inch pieces

title: Creamy Tomato Lasagna Florentine
description: This Creamy Tomato Lasagna Florentine is so deliciously comforting and simple. Noodles, tomato sauce, and a creamy spinach layer!
ingredients: 1 teaspoon Italian seasoning (mine was salty – if you’re using a non-salted variety, add an additional 1/4-1/2 teaspoon salt)
a very tiny dusting of nutmeg
12 no-boil or oven ready lasagna noodles
Chopped fresh parsley and grated Parmesan cheese for serving

title: Red Curry Lentils
description: Red curry lentils is my all-time favorite lentil recipe. Thick, creamy, saucy, and perfect as leftovers. Plus it's healthy and easy!
ingredients: 1 1/2 cups lentils, rinsed and picked over
a few good shakes of cayenne pepper

title: Grilled Chimichurri Portobellos with Goat Cheese Mashed Potatoes
description: These Grilled Chimichurri Portobellos are OUT OF THIS WORLD. Marinated in a punchy and vibrant chimichurri before heading to the grill, then served on top of a mountain of creamy goat cheese mashed potatoes.
ingredients: 1/2 cup finely chopped cilantro (not traditional) or parsley (traditional)

title: Lemon Herb Pasta Salad with Marinated Chickpeas
description: A super fresh, super summery Lemon Herb Pasta Salad! Packed with tangy marinated chickpeas, chewy pasta, lots of herbs and garlic, lemon juice and olive oil, and a handful of parmesan to top it off.
ingredients: one 14 ounce can chickpeas, drained and rinsed (DeLallo)
1 clove garlic, grated or crushed into a paste
a generous squeeze of lemon juice
juice and zest of one lemon
1/2 cup finely chopped parsley and basil

title: Roasted Tomato Puttanesca
description: The easiest Roasted Tomato Puttanesca with all the silky, all the briney, and all the zippy summer freshness. Roast up your veggies on a sheet pan, blend into a sauce, and toss it with your noodles. Hello dinner!
ingredients: 8 ounces fresh white button mushrooms, washed and quartered
half on an onion, roughly chopped
1 pound spaghetti (reserve 1/2 to 1 cup pasta water)

title: Seriously Good Tofu Burgers
description: Spicy Tofu Burgers! YES. Crumbled tofu pressed together with lemongrass, sriracha, and fresh herbs, all browned up into a delicious flavor-bomb burger.
ingredients: 1-2 tablespoons sriracha (for medium or hot, add more sriracha)

title: Sweet Potato Gnocchi with Broccoli Rabe and Garlic Sage Butter Sauce
description: Sweet Potato Gnocchi! The easiest and best way to make Sweet Potato Gnocchi! Serve it with broccoli rabe and garlic sage butter sauce for a BOMB meal.
ingredients: 5 cups finely chopped broccoli rabe (stems, leaves, and florets) – optional

title: Corn, Avocado, and Quinoa Salad with Marinated Tomatoes
description: The perfect summery quinoa salad - fresh corn, buttery avocado, nutty quinoa, juicy marinated tomatoes, and tons of fresh herbs. SO GOOD.
ingredients: 4 ears raw sweet corn, kernels cut off the cob
lots of fresh cilantro and chives, minced
1 pound cherry or grape tomatoes, halved or quartered
1 tablespoon freshly minced herbs (I like parsley)
salt to taste (I use about 1/2 – 3/4 teaspoon kosher salt)

title: Lemongrass Vermicelli Salad
description: Lemongrass Vermicelli Salad - a summer showstopper! A twirl of vermicelli noodles, pan-fried tofu, fresh herbs and veggies, and a lime-and-lemongrass-based sauce that just slips all over the plate.
ingredients: 1-2 tablespoons lemongrass paste, or 2 tablespoons freshly grated lemongrass (white parts only)
1 tablespoon roasted red chile paste (I used this kind but you can use whatever will give you some heat)
1 package vermicelli or thin rice noodles (about 8 ounces)
2 large carrots, shredded or julienne cut
1 lb. cooked tofu, shrimp, or chicken (or whatever protein you like)

title: One-Pot Garlic Parmesan Shellbows
description: These Garlic Parmesan Shellbows are LIFE-CHANGING. Creamy, garlicky, cheesy pasta that's made in just one pot. Make it a side, serve it in a skillet with chicken and veg, or eat it all on its own. SO good!
ingredients: 2 cloves garlic, minced (sub 1/4 teaspoon garlic powder)
1/4 cup heavy cream or half and half (optional)

title: Instant Pot Mac and Cheese
description: Instant Pot Mac and Cheese - made with just 5 real food ingredients. This is SO MUCH BETTER (and easier) than any mac and cheese I've ever had! Unreal.
ingredients: 3 tablespoons butter, cut into small pieces

title: Creamy Thai Sweet Potato Curry
description: Creamy Thai Sweet Potato Curry - packed with nutrition! our favorite easy, healthy, winter comfort food recipe. vegetarian and vegan.
ingredients: fish sauce (or vegan fish sauce) to taste

title: Amazing Mushroom Bowls with Kale Pesto
description: Amazing Mushroom Bowls with Kale Pesto! Smoky, sweet, salt mushrooms (or tempeh!), caramelized pineapple, peppers, and dollop of kale pesto, all served over rice. SO GOOD.
ingredients: 16 ounces fresh mushrooms, washed and cut into thick-ish slices
kale pesto, magic green sauce, or any other yummy sauce

title: Vegan Sheet Pan Fajitas with Chipotle Queso
description: These Vegan Sheet Pan Fajitas are SO GOOD. Roasted peppers and onions, steak-like portobello mushrooms, some mashed avocado, and waterfall of spicy cashew queso.
ingredients: 2 red bell peppers, cut into strips
2 yellow bell peppers, cut into strips
4 portobello mushroom caps, cut intro strips
1/2 teaspoon kosher salt (more if your cashews are unsalted)

title: Roasted Cauliflower Hummus Bowls
description: These Roasted Cauliflower Hummus Bowls are LIFE-CHANGING. A bed of garlicky creamy hummus, piled high with spiced roasted cauliflower, and a speckling of fresh lemony tomatoes and herbs.
ingredients: 1 teaspoon each paprika, cumin, and oregano
juice of two lemons (more or less to taste)
soft boiled egg or pulled rotisserie chicken
olive oil, kosher salt, black pepper

title: Spicy Sofritas Tofu
description: Spicy Sofritas Tofu, like homemade Chipotle! Think spicy peppers, garlic, tomatoes, and fresh cilantro in a flavorful simmer sauce for your tofu!
ingredients: 1-3 individual chipotle peppers canned in adobo sauce (1 for mild/medium, 3 for very spicy)
1 teaspoon chili powder or smoked paprika

title: Cauliflower Walnut Vegetarian Taco Meat
description: This vegetarian taco meat is made with cauliflower, walnuts, and chipotle peppers. It's so easy: just mix and bake. Meatless miracle!
ingredients: a pinch of cayenne for more heat

title: Spicy Peanut Tofu Bowls
description: These Spicy Peanut Tofu Bowls are a meal prep / weeknight dinner life-saver! Crispy tofu, roasted veggies, fluffy rice, and a spicy sweet peanut sauce all over top. YES.
ingredients: 2 small (or 1 large) head of broccoli, cut into florets
2 red bell peppers, cut into strips
2 tablespoons sambal oelek or chili paste (this is where the “spicy” comes in, so add to taste)

title: Easy Veggie Enchiladas
description: Easy Veggie Enchiladas! Saucy, cheese, filling, cozy, and packed with any roasted veggies you want. Super versatile and easy to make!
ingredients: 1 head of broccoli, cut into florets (2 cups)
1 small sweet potato, peeled and diced (2 cups)
1 14-ounce can black beans, rinsed and drained
avocado, cilantro, and lime for serving

title: Squash Salad with Kale and Roasted Garlic Dressing
description: Squash Salad with Kale and Roasted Garlic Dressing - the BEST Thanksgiving salad. Roasted garlicky kale, squash and chickpeas, crisp apple, dabbles of pepitas and dried cherries, and a drizzle of roasted garlic dressing over the top.
ingredients: 1 butternut squash, peeled and cubed (about 3 cups)
1 can Dakota’s Pride Garbanzo Beans, rinsed and drained
4-5 cups Simply Nature Organic Chopped Kale

title: Ridiculous Baked Gnocchi with Vodka Sauce
description: Baked Gnocchi with Vodka Sauce! Seriously cozy, seriously addicting. Pillowy-tender gnocchi tossed with an easy five-ingredient vodka sauce, baked under a layer of mozzarella, parmesan, and basil.
ingredients: 2 cloves garlic, grated, minced, or very thinly sliced

title: Instant Pot Cauliflower Curry
description: Instant Pot Cauliflower Curry! Tender cauliflower, butternut squash, and red lentils cooked in a coconut-creamy red curry sauce and poured over a mini-mountain of steamy rice. YUM.

title: Sheet Pan BBQ Tofu
description: Sheet Pan BBQ Tofu! BBQ-spice-crusted baked tofu that's made in a snap. Serve it in bowls, add it to salads, or eat it straight off the pan! YUM.

title: Easy Vegan Burrito Bowls
description: Vegan Burrito Bowls are WHERE IT'S AT. Spicy cauliflower walnut meat, blistered pepper strips, hot fluffy rice, and a heap of black beans. YUM.
ingredients: lime juice, garlic / onion powder, and cayenne to taste
1 14-ounce can black beans, rinsed and drained
lime wedges and cilantro for serving

title: Brussels Sprouts Tacos
description: Savory sauteed shredded brussels sprouts tucked into charred tortillas with roasted corn, jalapeno, black bean, and cilantro chimichurri. WHOA. Yes. Inspired by the Chloe Flavor cookbook.
ingredients: lime juice, salt, and olive oil
1 packed cup each cilantro and parsley
1/4 cup each water and olive oil
tortillas, black beans, corn, avocado, cotija cheese

title: 5 Ingredient Vegan Vodka Pasta
description: A creamy, tangy, luscious, and SUPER easy take on vodka pasta - and vegan!
ingredients: 1 pound rotini (or any pasta, but rotini is fun)
a little bit of reserved pasta water
season to taste with more salt, black pepper, olive oil, red pepper flakes, garlic salt, etc.

title: Oven Risotto with Garlic Roasted Mushrooms and Arugula
description: The best easy risotto - made in the oven! Served up with some garlic roasted mushrooms and a lemony arugula salad. YUM!
ingredients: zest and juice of one lemon
1 teaspoon salt (more or less to taste)

title: Red Curry Noodles
description: Red Curry Noodles! Lots of fresh veggies, seared tofu, slurpable noodles, and a saucy coconut red curry sauce. Stovetop to table in 30 minutes flat!
ingredients: 1 thumb-size piece of ginger, peeled and grated

title: Farmers' Market Pasta with Walnut Pesto
description: Farmer's Market Pasta! Vegan, summer veggie-loaded pasta with roasted garlic, olive oil, lemon juice, and a big dollop of herby walnut pesto. THE BEST.
ingredients: 8 ounces pasta (half of a box of farfalle, rigatoni, penne, whatever you like)
1 1/2 cups tightly packed basil leaves (you can sub other greens if you don’t have enough basil)
juice of 1 lemon (just use half if it’s really juicy)

title: Vegetarian Swedish Meatballs
description: Vegetarian Swedish Meatballs are FOR REAL! These little meatballs are made with wild rice and mushrooms and they are served up in a simple and savory brown gravy. Yum!
ingredients: 1/2 teaspoon onion powder and/or garlic powder
salt and black pepper to taste

title: Chipotle Tahini Bowls
description: Healthy and versatile bowls that come together under a generous drizzle of addictingly creamy vegan chipotle tahini sauce.
ingredients: Roasted sweet potatoes (see notes for my favorite method!)
Soft-boiled eggs (see notes for my favorite method!)

title: Coconut Curry Ramen
description: Coconut Curry Ramen with a creamy golden broth, pan-fried vegetables, cubes of golden brown tofu, and steamy delicious ramen noodles. Bonus: it's vegan!
ingredients: drizzle of oil and soy sauce
one 1-inch piece of peeled fresh ginger, minced
1 stalk of a green onion, sliced

title: Walnut Chorizo Tacos with Pineapple Salsa
description: Walnut Chorizo Tacos with Pineapple Salsa! Spicy walnut/cauliflower "meat", fresh guacamole, tangy slaw, and a homemade pineapple salsa. My favorite tacos!
ingredients: 2 individual Pueblo Lindo Chipotles in adobo sauce
2 jalapeños, ribs and seeds removed, minced
servings: 12 servings (a heaping 1/4 cup taco meat per serving)

title: Vegan Crunchwrap Supreme
description: This vegan crunchwrap is INSANE! You can stuff this bad boy with whatever you like - I made it with sofritas tofu and cashew queso. SO GOOD! Favorite vegan recipe to date.
ingredients: 16 ounces extra firm tofu (press out some liquid first)
2 tablespoons taco seasoning (add about 1 teaspoon salt if it’s unsalted)
1 can diced green chiles (or less, to taste)
1 teaspoon taco seasoning (add a pinch of salt if it’s unsalted)
something crunchy: tostadas or tortilla chips
fresh stuff: tomatoes, cabbage slaw, lettuce, cilantro

title: Healthy Chipotle Sweet Potato Skins
description: These healthy chipotle sweet potato skins are stuffed with a chipotle-sweet potato filling, black beans, corn, and topped with cheese.
ingredients: 1 can corn, rinsed and patted dry
1 can black beans, rinsed and drained
2-4 INDIVIDUAL chipotle peppers in adobo sauce, minced or pureed (not the whole can!)
1/4 cup light sour cream or Greek yogurt
6 tablespoons shredded cheese (Pepperjack, Cheddar, Colby Jack… anything will work)

title: Vegan Mega-Burritos
description: These Vegan Mega-Burritos are stuffed with a sweet potato, cauliflower, and walnut taco meat filling, plus the usual suspects of avocado, salsa, and a heavy thwap of vegan cashew queso! Versatile, quick to make, and seriously SO GOOD.
ingredients: 1 chipotle pepper canned in adobo (more to taste)
1/2 teaspoon kosher salt (more if your cashews are unsalted)
1-2 tablespoons of chipotle adobo sauce (optional for more oomph)
2-4 tablespoons nutritional yeast (optional for more cheeziness)

title: Cashew Crunch Salad with Sesame Dressing
description: This Cashew Crunch Salad is loaded up with crunchy veg, chow mein noodles, edamame, and roasted cashews and it'll make you ACTUALLY WANT TO EAT A SALAD. And the sesame dressing - OMG!
ingredients: 1/2 head of green cabbage, finely shredded
1/2 head of purple cabbage, finely shredded
chicken, shrimp, or any other protein you like
1/4 cup olive oil (you can use any other oil as well)
2 tablespoons sesame oil – very important for flavor!
a few shakes of garlic powder
optional: 1/4 cup Greek yogurt or mayo (more or less to taste – this changes it from a vinaigrette to more of a creamy dressing)

title: Couscous Summer Salad
description: Couscous Summer Salad! Spiced couscous, juicy nectarines, crunchy cucumber, avocado, chickpeas, cherries, sweet corn, and mint. It's sunshine in a bowl!
ingredients: 1 1/4 cups chicken or veggie broth, warm
2 pieces of fresh sweet corn, kernels cut off the cob
1/2 cup pepitas, sunflower seeds, or something crunchy
parsley / mint / basil / any herbs, really
lemon juice, honey, olive oil for dressing

title: Red Pepper Pasta with Roasted Cauliflower
description: Red Pepper Cashew Pasta with Roasted Cauliflower. ♡ TOO GOOD TO EVEN BE TRUE. This sauce is a three-ingredient game-changer!
ingredients: 2 heads of cauliflower, cut into florets
2 tablespoons olive oil + pinch of salt
1 jar (25 oz) pasta sauce (I use DeLallo because there’s no added sugar, and because their spicy arrabbiata sauce is life)
1 pound whole wheat penne pasta (I used DeLallo again)

title: Kimchi Fried Rice
description: Kimchi Fried Rice FTW! Cauliflower rice, frozen peas and carrots, fresh garlic and ginger, soy sauce, chili paste, a forkful of kimchi, and finished with a runny yolk waterfall. A new kind of comfort food.
ingredients: a spoonful of fresh crushed ginger
2-3 cups leftover cooked rice or cauliflower rice
1 cup kimchi (more or less to taste)
1-2 tablespoons chili paste or sriracha for topping
sesame oil and/or sesame seeds for topping

title: Buffalo Cauliflower Tacos with Avocado Crema
description: This colorful, spicy, crispy, mega-yum recipe was inspired by the amazing buffalo "wings" at J. Selby's in Saint Paul. One of my favorite meals!
ingredients: 1/4 teaspoon each garlic powder, salt, and pepper
3/4 cup hot sauce (I used Frank’s brand)
1/4 cup sour cream (yogurt would work, too)

title: 30 Minute Vegetarian Meatballs
description: These vegetarian meatballs are incredibly easy and super versatile! Packed with cauliflower, quinoa, brown rice, garlic, and spices. Stockpile these in your freezer and your future self will thank you.
ingredients: a 10-12 oz bag of cauliflower rice or 3 cups cauliflower florets
1 1/2 cups cooked quinoa and/or brown rice (I use one 8.5-ounce package of a pre-cooked blend – see FAQs)
1-2 teaspoons spices to taste (chili powder, paprika, and/or cumin will work)
olive oil to brush over the top

title: Life-Changing Crispy Fried Pizzas
description: Crispy fried pizzas that are light, airy, and the perfect combination of crispy/chewy. It is the ABSOLUTE BEST way to make amazing, restaurant-level pizza at home!
ingredients: 1 package of pizza dough (we use DeLallo! it is THE best.)
oil for frying (vegetable or canola is best)

title: Kitchen Sink Sunflower Salad
description: Kitchen Sink Sunflower Salad - featuring a veggie rainbow of brussels sprouts, sweet potato, beans, cucumber, and kale, and then drenched in this creamy, clean-eating sunflower dressing! YUM.
ingredients: water to thin it out to taste
protein of choice  (we used two crumbled veggie burgers )

title: Date Night Mushroom Fettuccine
description: Date Night Mushroom Fettuccine - elegant and luscious and FIVE INGREDIENT EASY.
ingredients: 1/2 cup Land O Lakes® Butter, divided
2 cloves fresh minced garlic, or a pinch of garlic salt
16 ounces fresh sliced mushrooms (more if you love mushrooms!)

title: Firecracker Vegan Lettuce Wraps
description: HELLO YUM. Firecracker Lettuce Wraps that are happily vegan - with crispy tofu bits, saucy brown rice noodles, and a creamy sesame sauce.
ingredients: 2 tablespoons chili paste (like sambal oelek) ++ for more firecrackery-ness
a small knob of fresh ginger, peeled
a clove of fresh garlic, peeled

title: Avocado Kale Caesar Salad + Sweet Potato Fries
description: Avocado Kale Caesar Salad! Kale, avocado, and crunchy seeds drenched in a quick creamy avocado caesar dressing that can easily be made vegan, too. Toss some crispy sweet potato fries in are you are SET FOR LIFE.
ingredients: 1 bunch kale, stems removed, chopped (5-6 cups)
servings: 4 servings as an entree salad, 6 as a side

title: Instant Pot Wild Rice Soup
description: We're making cozy Instant Pot Wild Rice Soup and it's everything! Packed with mushrooms, carrots, celery, wild rice, cream, and seasonings. It's so creamy, so cozy, and perfect for a night in.
ingredients: OR replace all of the above with 1 1/2 cups heavy cream
1-2 tablespoons sherry (it seems forgettable but it adds a lot)

title: Pumpkin Gnocchi with Sage Butter Sauce
description: Pumpkin Gnocchi! So incredibly pillowy and delicious. Topped with a 5 ingredient sage garlic butter sauce that will blow your mind.
ingredients: 1 3/4 cups all purpose flour (more as needed)
2 tablespoons Land O Lakes® Salted Butter in Half Sticks (for pan frying)
2 tablespoons Land O Lakes® Salted Butter in Half Sticks
a few sage leaves and a smashed clove of garlic
1/2 cup starchy water (leftover from boiling the gnocchi)

title: Back Pocket Stir Fry with Noodles
description: Back Pocket Stir Fry with Noodles - simplicity wins. Brown rice noodles with tofu and all kinds of colorful veggies for a quick and easy dinner! vegan, vegetarian.
ingredients: 3-4 cup chopped vegetables (I used a pre-chopped fresh stir fry mix)
peanuts, cilantro, and lime for serving
1/4 cup soy sauce (or tamari for a gluten-free option)

title: 5-Ingredient Green Curry
description: 5-Ingredient Green Curry! packed with tons of veggies, an easy green curry sauce, and finished with golden raisins and cilantro.
ingredients: a swish of olive oil + a sprinkle of salt
4 tablespoons green curry paste (I used Thai Kitchen)
a handful of chopped fresh cilantro
just a lil fish sauce (trust me!) and brown sugar to taste

title: Sunshine Lentil Bowls with Garlic Olive Oil Dressing
description: Sunshine Lentil Bowls featuring garden produce like green beans, tomatoes, herbs, roasty potatoes, soft scrambled eggs with goat cheese, and lentils! lots of lentils. My favorite way to do a clean eating reset between all those summery treats.
ingredients: 1 tablespoon coarse sea salt (or 2 teaspoons table salt) and a pinch of black pepper
1 teaspoon each dry oregano and dry basil

title: Summery Chipotle Corn Chowder
description: This Chipotle Corn Chowder is creamy, just a little spicy, and chock-full of summer vegetables, including corn, zucchini, and basil. Vegan / Gluten Free.
ingredients: 1/2 cup loosely packed fresh basil leaves, for serving
seeds, nuts, oils, etc. for topping

title: The Ultimate Wild Rice Burgers
description: These are THE ULTIMATE wild rice burgers and I might even say the best vegetarian burgers I've ever had. The recipe comes from the Duluth Grill Cookbook.
ingredients: 5 cups wild rice, cooked – see notes
1 teaspoon each salt, pepper, and garlic powder
1/2 teaspoon cayenne (optional, to taste, for heat)

title: Spicy Cauliflower Burgers
description: Recipe for Spicy Cauliflower Burgers with avocado sauce, cilantro lime slaw, and chipotle mayo! Meatless, filling, and delicious!
ingredients: a few generous shakes of spicy seasoning – cumin, chili powder, cayenne, etc.
1/2 teaspoon garlic salt OR just a minced garlic clove or two
a few good squeezes of lime juice

title: Baked Mac and Cheese
description: This Baked Mac and Cheese is cheesy on the inside, crispy on the outside, heavy on the OMG yum factor. It's my take on the recipe from The Food Lab: Better Home Cooking Through Science cookbook.
ingredients: 8 ounces American, Gruyere, or any other smooth melting cheese, grated or cut into chunks

title: Southwest Sweet Potato Tater Tot Hotdish
description: This sweet potato tater tot hotdish is a spicy twist on the original - loaded with peppers, corn, black beans, homemade queso sauce, and tots! YUM!
ingredients: 16 ounces fresh mushrooms, stems removed, chopped
1 pound pepperjack cheese, cut into cubes
red peppers, corn, cilantro, jalapeño for topping (optional)

title: 15 Minute Lo Mein
description: 15 Minute Lo Mein! Made with just soy sauce, oyster sauce, sesame oil, a pinch of sugar, ramen noodles or spaghetti noodles, and any veggies or protein you like. SO YUMMY!
ingredients: 2 tablespoons dark soy sauce (sub regular soy sauce if needed)
1 tablespoon light soy sauce (sub regular soy sauce if needed)
3 green onions, chopped (separate green parts from white parts – you’ll use both separately)
2-3 cups julienne cut or chopped vegetables like carrots, red peppers, cabbage, bok choy, mushrooms, or broccoli

title: General Tso's Cauliflower
description: General Tso's Cauliflower - golden brown crispy fried cauliflower tossed in a made-from-scratch savory-sweet sauce. Awesome vegetarian / meatless recipe.
ingredients: 2 tablespoons cornstarch, dissolved in 1-2 tablespoons of cold water
1 head cauliflower, cut into small florets
a deep layer of oil for frying
scallions and sesame seeds for topping

title: Spicy Sesame Zoodles with Crispy Tofu
description: Spicy Sesame Zoodles with Crispy Tofu! SUPER easy recipe with familiar ingredients - soy sauce, peanut butter, sesame oil, garlic, zucchini, and tofu. Vegan / Vegetarian
ingredients: 1/3 cup light low sodium soy sauce
1 knob of fresh ginger, peeled and grated
sesame seeds and scallions for topping

title: Spicy Falafel and Roasted Veggie Naan-wich
description: Naan-wich: 5 ingredient falafel, roasted veggies, and avocado sauce stuffed between pillowy garlic naan. Best sandwich recipe I've ever made.
ingredients: one 12-ounce jar of sun-dried tomatoes, packed in oil
3 big pieces of garlic naan, torn in half (I use store-bought and I’m very okay with it)
10-12 pieces of easy 5 ingredient baked falafel
one batch of Magic Green Sauce

title: The Best Migas
description: Migas - eggs scrambled with crispy tortillas, garlic, jalapeño, and melted cheese served with black beans and avocado. Quick, easy, and SO DELICIOUS. Breakfast, lunch, dinner, or brunch!
ingredients: 5-6 small corn tortillas, cut into strips
1/2 cup shredded Pepperjack or other cheese
black beans, Cotija cheese, salt, pepper, avocado, tomato salsa for serving

title: Dynamite Plant Power Sushi Bowls
description: Dynamite Sushi Bowls! just like a dynamite roll, but easier and healthier with tofu, avocado, cucumber, ginger, brown rice, and spicy mayo. Vegetarian / easily made vegan.
ingredients: sriracha + mayo for the spicy mayo drizzle

title: Healing Bowls with Turmeric Sweet Potatoes, Poached Eggs, and Lemon Dressing
description: Healing Bowls: turmeric sweet potatoes, brown rice, red quinoa, arugula, poached egg, lemon dressing.
ingredients: 2 large sweet potatoes, cut into chunks
pistachios or other nuts for topping

title: The Absolute Easiest Spinach and Artichoke Pizza
description: This really is the absolute easiest Spinach and Artichoke Pizza! Garlicky spreadable cheese, canned artichokes, fresh spinach, sun-dried tomatoes, and mozzarella - all on a pre-made pizza crust. Oof, it's good!
ingredients: 3 ounces garlic herb spreadable cheese (I used half of a package of Alouette)
a few jarred or canned artichokes (I used a jar of grilled marinated artichokes)
a handful of fresh baby spinach
a handful of shredded mozzarella cheese
some jarred sun-dried tomatoes, sun-dried tomato pesto, or similar

title: The Ultimate Winter Bliss Bowls
description: Keep your glow all winter! Easy homemade falafel, roasted veggies, and flavorful sauce all in one big bliss bowl! vegetarian / vegan / gluten free recipe.
ingredients: 8-10 pieces of Simple 5 Ingredient Baked Falafel
tahini, lemon juice, honey, and/or olive oil for drizzling

title: Roasted Tomatoes with Goat Cheese Polenta
description: Roasted Tomatoes with Goat Cheese Polenta! Fresh, juicy tomatoes, vibrant green spinach, and a creamy goat cheese polenta!
ingredients: 3 cups cherry tomatoes (or small tomatoes – tricolor or heirloom are super pretty!)
1 cup corn grits or polenta (I used Bob’s Red Mill – you can buy it on Amazon here)

title: Simple Mushroom Penne with Walnut Pesto
description: Simple Mushroom Penne with Walnut Pesto - made with easy ingredients like Parmesan cheese, whole wheat penne, mushrooms, garlic, and butter. Vegetarian.
ingredients: 1/4 cup grated or shaved Parmesan cheese
1 1/2 cups packed greens (spinach or basil are great – but keep some basil for a more traditional pesto flavor)
servings: 4-6, depending on how hungry you are!

title: Spicy Southwestern Salad with Avocado Dressing
description: This healthy Spicy Southwestern Salad recipe has roasted sweet potatoes, black beans, corn, lettuce, and creamy avocado dressing!
ingredients: 1 heaping teaspoon each cumin and chili powder (plus a sprinkle of cayenne if you like it hot)
1 14-ounce can black beans, rinsed and drained
1 14-ounce can sweet corn, rinsed and drained

title: Creamy Garlic Sun-Dried Tomato Pasta
description: You are thisclose to enjoying Creamy Garlic Sun-Dried Tomato Pasta! Garlicky spirali noodles and tender sun-dried tomatoes in a creamy, luscious sauce with a heavy dusting of Parmesan cheese.
ingredients: 8 ounces DeLallo spirali pasta (okay, you don’t have to use spirali, but it is SO FUN)
1/4 cup DeLallo sun-dried tomatoes packed in oil, sliced or chopped
up to 1/2 cup reserved pasta water
a big bunch of chopped chives or parsley

title: Black Pepper Stir Fried Udon
description: This Black Pepper Stir Fried Udon is the perfect SOS dinner! Saucy udon noodles, dark soy sauce, stir fry veggies, fresh garlic, and lots of freshly ground black pepper. So easy!
ingredients: 3 tablespoons dark soy sauce (see FAQs if using regular soy sauce)
a little bit of neutral oil
2 cups of stir fry veggies (I use about half of a bag of a frozen stir fry veggie blend)
two 7-ounce packages of udon noodles (the cooked, fat, squishy ones, like this – see post for more noodle options)
a ton of freshly ground black pepper

title: Beet and Burrata Salad with Fried Bread
description: This Beet and Burrata Salad is everything you need. Juicy beets and oranges, a creamy and luscious burrata scoop, peppery arugula, a quick vinaigrette, and crispy fried bread. SO MUCH YES!
ingredients: a few taps of garlic powder
a big handful of chopped chives

title: Chili Garlic Pappardelle with Smashed Broccoli and Soft Eggs
description: Slippery, spicy, bossy noodles with a minimal-ingredient sauce, topped with a pile of roasty smashed broccoli and a perfectly messy soft egg. Yes, please.
ingredients: 1 head of broccoli, cut into florets (about 4 cups)
1 tablespoon DeLallo Private Reserve Extra Virgin Olive Oil

title: Instant Pot Sweet Potato Tortilla Soup
description: Instant Pot Sweet Potato Tortilla Soup! A smoky, limey, tomato-rich broth with onion, garlic, jalapeño, crispy tortilla strips, and tender chunks of sweet potato.
ingredients: 2 large sweet potatoes, peeled and diced
one 28-ounce can fire roasted crushed tomatoes
2 chipotle peppers in adobo (canned), minced, or a dash of chipotle powder
cilantro, red onion, lime wedges, etc.

title: Instant Pot Red Curry Lentils
description: Guess what's for dinner? Creamy, spicy, delicious red curry lentils, made in the Instant Pot. This is the BEST easy, filling, healthy dinner!
ingredients: a few good shakes of cayenne pepper

title: Instant Pot Minestrone Soup
description: Instant Pot Minestrone! With tons of veggies, beans, pesto, tomato sauce, parsley, topped with Parmesan, served with bread. Veg-friendly, nutritious, easily made vegan.
ingredients: half of a head of green cabbage, thinly sliced

title: Instant Pot Pumpkin Walnut Chili
description: Yummy vegan instant pot chili featuring red lentils, fire-roasted tomatoes, walnuts, black beans, pumpkin, chipotles, and all the good toppings. I LOVE THIS ONE.
ingredients: 6 cups water or broth (refill the tomato can about 2x)
2 or 3 14-ounce cans black beans, rinsed and drained

title: Crispy Rice Salad with Cucumbers and Herbs
description: Paper-thin veggies, a shower of herbs, a pile of fried crispy red curry rice, and a limey garlicky vinaigrette all over top. This crispy rice salad is all I want to eat right now!
ingredients: a 1/2-inch knob of fresh ginger, or a spoonful of ginger paste (note 1)
1/4 cup + 2 tablespoons avocado oil, or another neutral oil
half an English cucumber, thinly sliced (about 1 cup)
1 shallot, thinly sliced or minced (about 1/4 cup)
1 bunch mint, roughly chopped or torn (about 1/4 cup)
servings: 2 generous salad servings (but extra dressing to make it again)

title: Steph's Chickpea Curry with Spinach and Rice
description: Amazingly creamy, saucy chickpea curry served over rice with a dollop of chili crisp and a side of cucumber salad. Ready in 20 minutes!
ingredients: 1 1/2 tablespoons red curry paste (currently loving Maesri or Thai Kitchen brand)
one 14-ounce can full fat coconut milk
one 14-ounce can chickpeas, drained and rinsed

title: 7-Layer Beet Salad
description: This 7-Layer Beet Salad is a stunner! Studded with cooked beets, supremed oranges, chopped pistachios, creamy truffle ricotta, and a bit of fresh mint. So fresh, so good!
ingredients: 1/4 cup of balsamic store-bought dressing, simple green salad dressing, or just olive oil and lemon
8 small cooked beets (2 packages if you’re buying Love Beets)
1/2 cup truffle ricotta or ricotta cheese
2 tablespoons fresh mint OR other chopped herbs you like (basil, chives, or thyme would be good)

title: The Best Detox Crockpot Lentil Soup
description: Detox Crockpot Lentil Soup - a clean and simple soup made with onions, garlic, carrots, olive oil, squash, and LENTILS! Super healthy and easy to make.
ingredients: 3/4 cup yellow split peas (or just use more lentils)
1/2 cup olive oil – rosemary olive oil or other herb infused oil is delicious
a swish of sherry, red wine vinegar, or lemon juice to add a nice tangy bite

title: Mediterranean Quinoa Bowls with Roasted Red Pepper Sauce
description: Mediterranean Quinoa Bowls with Roasted Red Pepper Sauce! A mix of quinoa, cucumbers or kale or spinach, feta cheese, kalamata olives, and pepperoncini!
ingredients: 1 16 ounce jar of roasted red peppers, drained (or roast your own red peppers and win the food game!)
olive oil, lemon juice, salt, pepper

title: Lemony Herb-Loaded Chopped Greek Salad
description: Chopped Greek Salad - clean eating with TONS of flavor! cucumbers, tomato, kalamata olives, red onion, mint, parsley, quinoa, and a lemon olive oil drizzle! vegan, vegetarian.
ingredients: 1 14-ounce can white beans (lentil and garbanzos are yummy too)
3 cups chopped fresh herbs – I like mint, parsley, and basil
2 cups chopped red onion (one should be enough)
2 cups chopped cucumbers (one should be enough)

title: Cauliflower Fried Rice with Crispy Tofu
description: Cauliflower Fried Rice! Healthy + clean fried rice made with cauliflower, carrots, onions, garlic, eggs, sesame oil and THE BEST baked crispy tofu.
ingredients: 15 ounces extra firm tofu, pressed and cubed
1 medium-sized head of cauliflower, cut into florets
2-3 cups frozen peas and carrots (or really any veggies you want)
a lil bit of soy sauce

title: Broccoli Salad with Creamy Almond Dressing
description: Healthy Broccoli Salad - non-mayo-based vegan goodness! With purple cabbage, raisins, almonds, green onions, and almond butter dressing.
ingredients: 2 heads broccoli, cut into small florets

title: Spiced Chickpea and Couscous Bowls
description: Spiced Chickpea Bowls: clean eating meets comfort food! vegetarian / vegan.
ingredients: 1 tablespoon each – chili powder and cumin
1 teaspoon each – turmeric and garam masala
dash of each – cinnamon and cayenne (to taste)
two 14-ounce cans chickpeas, drained and rinsed

title: Spicy Instant Pot Carrot Soup
description: Curry-like spicy carrot soup made with 7 easy ingredients - in the Instant Pot if you want. Extremely smooth and velvety, and bonus: it's super healthy.
ingredients: 8-10 large carrots, peeled and chopped coarsely

title: Spring Detox Cauliflower Salad
description: An herby, fresh vegan power salad featuring cauliflower, apples, shallots, roasted spiced chickpeas, and a quick grainy mustard dressing.
ingredients: a handful of parsley and mint, chopped
juice and zest of one lime

title: Sheet Pan Breakfast Burritos with Creamy Chipotle Sauce
description: I absolutely love these breakfast burritos. Creamy scrambled eggs, roasted garlic veggies, smoky cheese, and refried beans all wrapped up in a delicious burrito!
ingredients: 1 large russet potato, peeled and cubed (about 2 heaping cups – see notes for using hasbrowns)
half of a yellow onion, thinly sliced
1/2 tablespoon Better Than Bouillon Roasted Garlic Base (optional, but great for flavor)
1/2 tablespoon Better Than Bouillon Roasted Garlic Base (optional, but great for flavor)
6 large tortillas (more or less depending on size of your tortilla)
salsa, or chipotle sauce for dipping (ingredients in notes!)

title: Miso Peanut Ramen Bowls
description: A sweet and creamy savory broth ladled into bowls with noodles, crispy crumbled tofu, and fresh veg! These ramen bowls are SO GOOD.
ingredients: 1 block extra firm tofu (I like the high protein tofu from Trader Joe’s, but any firm tofu will work)
1/4 cup teriyaki (I use Bachan’s Japanese BBQ sauce)
1 tablespoon red curry paste or roasted red chili paste
1-2 tablespoons peanut butter (just a little plop)
1 1/2 cups water + 1 1/2 teaspoons Better Than Bouillon roasted chicken or vegetable base (sub 1 1/2 cups chicken or vegetable broth)
6 ounces uncooked ramen noodles (two 3-ounce packets, just the noodles)

title: Marry Me Chickpeas and Orzo
description: A perfect 20-minute dinner! Chickpeas and orzo in a luscious, creamy, max-flavor tomato sauce.
ingredients: 2 tablespoons olive oil (this is the one I use)
3 cups chicken broth (I use 3 cups water + 3 teaspoons Better Than Bouillon)
a small bundle of fresh thyme
1/4 cup jarred sun-dried tomatoes, tomato bruschetta (my favorite!), Calabrian chiles, or similar
1-2 cups fresh spinach, torn into pieces
parmesan, red pepper flakes, and more thyme for topping

title: Crispy Smashed Potato Salad
description: Pickley salad, crispy potatoes, and creamy ranch - this smashed potato salad is the perfect summer combo!
ingredients: a quarter of a red onion, thinly sliced (about 1/4 cup)
1 tablespoon freeze-dried dill (or 1/4 cup fresh, chopped)

title: Crispy Buffalo Tofu with Caesar Salad
description: This Buffalo Tofu is SO EASY! A two-ingredient sauce tossed with air-fried crispy tofu, laid on top of a kale caesar salad.
ingredients: 16 ounce package of tofu (firm or extra firm)
1/4 cup hot sauce (like Frank’s red hot)
Salad with Caesar, ranch, or bleu cheese dressing (I especially love to throw this tofu on top of an avocado kale Caesar salad!)
servings: 2-4 servings (I make this for me and my husband + 2 small kids)

title: Roasted Red Pepper Pasta
description: Restaurant-level pasta, easy enough to be SOS! Caramelized shallots folded into a silky red pepper sauce, and tossed with noodles. Heaven!
ingredients: 1/2 cup roasted red peppers (jarred, drained – 3-5 pieces)
1/2 teaspoon Better than Bouillon chicken or vegetable broth base
1 large shallot, sliced thinly on a mandoline
8 ounces pasta – my favorite is pennoni
1/2 cup reserved pasta water (optional, as needed)
basil leaves and/or red pepper flakes

title: Ridiculously Good Air Fryer Broccoli
description: This Air Fryer Broccoli is both tender and crisped at the same time. So easy and done it 10 minutes! We've been making it every night and my kids go wild for it.
ingredients: one 12-ounce bag broccoli florets (or, one head of broccoli cut into about 3 cups of florets)
1-2 tablespoons avocado oil or olive oil

title: Sweet Potato Soup with Roasted Cauliflower Crumbles
description: This sweet potato soup is luscious, silky, and seriously good! Sweet potatoes and red onion get roasted and blended to perfection, and topped with crispy bits of cauliflower.
ingredients: 1 red onion, cut into large chunks or slices
3 sweet potatoes, cut into chunks (about 6 cups)
2 tablespoons avocado oil or olive oil
a small bundle of chives, chopped
a drizzle of infused oil (I like a spicy chili oil)

title: Brussels Sprouts with Gochujang Butter
description: Shredded roasty brussels sprouts flecked with toasted walnuts and bites of plumped dried cranberries, and blanketed with a luscious sheen of gochujang garlic butter sauce.
ingredients: 1 1/2 tablespoons gochujang sauce, like this one (Bibigo)

title: Scallion Pancake with Eggs
description: A frozen scallion pancake, loaded with eggs, spinach, avocado and chili crisp! A five minute meal perfect for breakfast, lunch, or dinner!
ingredients: a spritz of avocado oil, or a small pat of butter
